episodic.description: Realized AI chats forget everything. Started logging identity + state to disk so work survives session resets.
Recovered the journal pattern from fragments after storage failure. Confirmed that append-only state + episodic memory is enough to rehydrate an agent.
Stripped fluff (cloud keys, site-specific automation) and published a clean portable journal for any LLM under DIGIVASCONNECT PTY (LTD).

open_loops: Optional npm publish after GitHub traction
